content_of_post_to_comment: I should be happy with my life. I have a phenomenal spouse, loving parents, good friends, a job that pays enough and am a double ivy grad. However, all I can ever think about is that I was not successful in grad school and am now behind people who I used to be ahead of. I have tried therapy and it hasn't helped, so all I do is use my phone. My screen time between my phone and laptop is 14 hours a day. I often have netflix in the background while I'm working. However, when I cut it out all I can think about is my failures and I start feeling suicidal. also, I have tried a million hobbies but I don't find any of them remotely enjoyable (I hate not being good at things). How do you cut out screens when it is what is keeping me happy and alive? I'm fine being off my devices when I'm socializing but I can't mandate other people hang out with me constantly
